title: Poincaré duality and resonance varieties
journal: Proceedings of the Royal Society of Edinburgh: Section A Mathematics 150 (2020) 3001-3027
journal_ref: Proceedings of the Royal Society of Edinburgh: Section A Mathematics 150 (2020) 3001-3027
abstract: We explore the constraints imposed by Poincaré duality on the resonance varieties of a graded algebra. For a 3-dimensional Poincaré duality algebra $A$, we obtain a fairly precise geometric description of the resonance varieties $\mathcal{R}^i_k(A)$.
comment: 26 pages; accepted for publication in the Proceedings of the Royal Society of Edinburgh Section A: Mathematics
